basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Photographer Junior Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)
basic_details.short_information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) Photographer Junior Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 12 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BFUHS Photographer Junior Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation: Upper age limit relaxed up to 45 years for Punjab Govt./Boards/Corporations/Commissions/Authorities employees and all States/Central Govt. employees. Upper age limit relaxed up to 40 years for widows, divorcees and certain other categories of married women as per Punjab Govt. letter no. 1/50/83-5PP(1368)-3454 dated 23-04-1984.

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 or its equivalent qualification from a recognized Board/Institution/University. Two Years Diploma i
qualification.details: 10+2 or its equivalent qualification from a recognized Board/Institution/University. Two Years Diploma in Photography from a recognized Board/Institution. Minimum Two (2) years experience as Photographer in Govt. Institutions/Studio.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level as per 7th CPC and University Service Rules
salary_details.details: Pay Level as per 7th CPC and University Service Rules (pay scales as per Punjab Govt. Finance Dept. No. 7/42/2020-SFP1/741-746 dated 17-07-2020)

selection_process: Written Test (minimum 33% marks to qualify) Marks for Experience Inter-se Merit Document Verification Police Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Photographer Junior Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BFUHS Photographer Junior recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the BFUHS Photographer Junior recruitment is 01 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Photographer Junior post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed 10+2 or equivalent, possess a Two Years Diploma in Photography, and have at least two years of experience as a Photographer in a government institution or studio.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Photographer Junior position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 37 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Photographer Junior post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Photographer Junior post in Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official BFUHS website.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Photographer Junior post?
faq.answer: The salary will be as per Pay Level of the 7th CPC and University Service Rules, following the pay scales set by the Punjab Government Finance Department.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Photographer Junior role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, evaluation of Marks for Experience, Inter-se Merit, Document Verification, and Police Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates should check the official notification for any updates regarding fees.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the 'Important Links' section of this article. Always refer to the official website for the most accurate information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Baba Farid University of Health Sciences?
faq.answer: The official website of Baba Farid University of Health Sciences is www.bfuhs.ac.in. Candidates can visit this site for more details and updates.
